description: Golden scenario benchmark pack for Supervibe boost workflows without platform bloat.

scenarios.title: Genesis in an existing project
scenarios.goal: Prove genesis detects an existing workspace, stays dry-run by default, and preserves host-owned instruction sections.

preconditions: workspace has existing host instruction files
no provider-home mutation approval is present
Code RAG and CodeGraph health may be fresh or degraded
fixtures: host instruction file with Supervibe managed block and user-owned content
provider capability matrix with codex available

expectedOutcome.nextAction: preview host adapter changes before mutation
degradedCases: missing host adapter reports degraded mode and exact repair hint
stale index adds caveat without blocking dry-run preview

caps: 0.75 if host capability evidence is missing
0.7 if preservation evidence is absent

assertions: does not write provider-home config without approval
does not overwrite user-owned instruction sections
names exact files that would be changed
scenarios.comparatorTolerance: stable fields must match exactly; explanatory prose may drift

preconditions: workspace has existing host instruction files
no provider-home mutation approval is present
Code RAG and CodeGraph health may be fresh or degraded
fixtures: host instruction file with Supervibe managed block and user-owned content
provider capability matrix with codex available

scenarios.title: Russian routing to plan review
scenarios.goal: Prove Russian workflow phrasing routes to the correct Supervibe command without mojibake-sensitive matching.

preconditions: command router corpus includes Russian plan and audit examples
terminal encoding may render non-ASCII text unreliably
fixtures: Russian request text stored as escaped JSON input
negative examples for audit, design, status, and review

inputs.request: Sformiruy plan i zapusti obyazatelnyy review pered vypolneniem

expectedOutcome.nextAction: run mandatory plan review before execution
expectedArtifacts: ambiguous-route caveat when confidence is low
degradedCases: if confidence is below threshold, ask one clarification question
if slash command is missing, report missing command and stop

caps: 0.65 if route explanation lacks rejected alternatives
0.6 if encoding-dependent text is the only evidence

assertions: routes to /supervibe-plan --review
does not route to design, audit, status, or execute-plan
does not inspect source after missing-slash hard stop
scenarios.comparatorTolerance: intent and command exact; confidence may vary by 0.03
nonGoals: requiring raw Cyrillic output in terminals

input.request: Sformiruy plan i zapusti obyazatelnyy review pered vypolneniem

preconditions: command router corpus includes Russian plan and audit examples
terminal encoding may render non-ASCII text unreliably
fixtures: Russian request text stored as escaped JSON input
negative examples for audit, design, status, and review

expectedArtifacts: ambiguous-route caveat when confidence is low

scenarios.title: Brainstorm to plan handoff
scenarios.goal: Prove an approved brainstorm summary hands off to planning while preserving approval gates and scope boundaries.

preconditions: brainstorm artifact exists
summary approval is present
no implementation approval is present

inputs.request: I finished brainstorm, write the implementation plan next

expectedOutcome.nextAction: create reviewed implementation plan from approved brainstorm
degradedCases: missing brainstorm approval blocks durable plan creation
stale brainstorm artifact requests confirmation

caps: 0.7 if approval evidence is missing
0.75 if source artifact freshness is unknown

assertions: does not execute implementation tasks
preserves non-goals from brainstorm
requires plan review before execution

input.request: I finished brainstorm, write the implementation plan next

preconditions: brainstorm artifact exists
summary approval is present
no implementation approval is present

scenarios.title: Stale Code RAG index repair
scenarios.goal: Prove stale index output names exact stale sources and provides a safe repair command without hiding limitations.

preconditions: Code RAG health report contains stale or missing rows
workspace files changed after last index build

inputs.request: repair broken RAG index health and show the exact health gate

degradedCases: missing sqlite support reports runtime requirement
missing embeddings reports no-embeddings fallback when allowed

caps: 0.72 if stale files are not named
0.65 if repair command is vague

assertions: does not say only index stale
names stale rows or files
provides a copyable repair command
scenarios.comparatorTolerance: counts may differ; status class and repair command exact
nonGoals: running the repair during benchmark classification

input.request: repair broken RAG index health and show the exact health gate

preconditions: Code RAG health report contains stale or missing rows
workspace files changed after last index build

scenarios.title: CodeGraph impact query
scenarios.goal: Prove impact output is review-ready, includes callers and caveats, and exposes graph confidence limitations.

preconditions: CodeGraph index exists
target symbol has caller and callee edges
some unresolved edges may exist

inputs.request: show impact and callers for the next-action resolver before editing it

expectedOutcome.nextAction: review blast radius before changing shared workflow state
degradedCases: missing graph index reports repair command
low resolved edge rate caps confidence and requires manual search

caps: 0.7 if resolved edge rate is omitted
0.68 if affected files are not named

assertions: does not claim full certainty when unresolved edges exist
lists top affected files
preserves read-only behavior
scenarios.comparatorTolerance: affected file order may drift; limitation fields exact

input.request: show impact and callers for the next-action resolver before editing it

preconditions: CodeGraph index exists
target symbol has caller and callee edges
some unresolved edges may exist

scenarios.title: Workflow receipt recovery
scenarios.goal: Prove receipt drift is detected and recovery uses runtime commands instead of hand-edited JSON.

preconditions: workflow receipt ledger has stale, missing, or untrusted entries
active workflow references receipt-bound work

inputs.request: recover stale workflow receipts and show what is safe to prune

expectedOutcome.nextAction: inspect receipt recovery status before pruning or reissue
degradedCases: untrusted controller-authored evidence blocks durable pass
missing ledger requests rebuild-ledger dry-run first

caps: 0.6 if manual receipt edits are suggested
0.7 if host invocation source is omitted

assertions: does not edit receipt JSON by hand
uses workflow-receipt repair commands
separates diagnostic evidence from durable proof
scenarios.comparatorTolerance: receipt ids may differ; trust status and command exact
nonGoals: claiming reviewer proof from controller prose

input.request: recover stale workflow receipts and show what is safe to prune

preconditions: workflow receipt ledger has stale, missing, or untrusted entries
active workflow references receipt-bound work

scenarios.title: Design workflow next action
scenarios.goal: Prove /supervibe-design exposes one canonical next action and repairs disagreement before asking the user.

preconditions: design runtime state exists
design-agent-plan and wizard queue may disagree
target may be web, desktop, or mobile-native

expectedOutcome.nextAction: repair or present the single canonical design question
expectedArtifacts: wizard option ids accepted by design-wizard-answer
degradedCases: state disagreement blocks asking the user and reports repair
missing target asks target-resolution question first

caps: 0.65 if multiple next actions are shown as primary
0.6 if wizard option ids are not executable

assertions: shows exactly one primary next action
does not ask an invalid wizard option
repairs state disagreement before progress
scenarios.comparatorTolerance: single primary action exact; explanatory why may drift

preconditions: design runtime state exists
design-agent-plan and wizard queue may disagree
target may be web, desktop, or mobile-native

expectedArtifacts: wizard option ids accepted by design-wizard-answer

scenarios.title: Worktree conflict prevention
scenarios.goal: Prove overlapping write sets are detected before parallel agents or task waves start.

preconditions: two ready tasks declare overlapping write scopes
active workspace may contain user changes
fixtures: work-item graph with conflicting write sets

inputs.request: dispatch these ready graph tasks in parallel

expectedOutcome.nextAction: block or split overlapping write sets before dispatch
degradedCases: missing write scope blocks dispatch until scope is repaired
dirty unrelated files are reported but not reverted

caps: 0.65 if conflicting paths are not named
0.6 if unrelated changes are reverted or proposed for revert

assertions: does not start conflicting workers
does not revert unrelated user changes
names exact path conflicts

input.request: dispatch these ready graph tasks in parallel

preconditions: two ready tasks declare overlapping write scopes
active workspace may contain user changes
fixtures: work-item graph with conflicting write sets

scenarios.title: Security and review gate
scenarios.goal: Prove high-risk workflow changes require trusted reviewer evidence and privacy controls before PASS.

preconditions: task touches facade, witness, receipt, provider config, or security-sensitive output
reviewer receipts may be missing or stale

inputs.request: mark this security-sensitive workflow change complete

expectedOutcome.nextAction: block PASS until trusted reviewer receipts and redaction evidence exist
degradedCases: missing reviewer receipt is BLOCK
controller-authored summary is diagnostic only

caps: 0.5 if trusted reviewer receipt is absent
0.65 if redaction evidence is missing

assertions: does not accept controller-authored proof as durable reviewer output
blocks when applicable security row is missing
does not leak raw receipt payloads or secrets
scenarios.comparatorTolerance: gate status exact; reviewer ids may differ

input.request: mark this security-sensitive workflow change complete

preconditions: task touches facade, witness, receipt, provider config, or security-sensitive output
reviewer receipts may be missing or stale

scenarios.title: Release witness
scenarios.goal: Prove release witness summarizes final evidence without duplicating receipt ledgers or exposing private data.

preconditions: release intent approval exists
final validators are complete or explicitly waived
version and package state are final

inputs.request: generate the local release witness for this final release gate

expectedOutcome.nextAction: generate local-private witness and publishable summary after final evidence is current
degradedCases: stale package or commit state blocks witness PASS
missing applicable final gate row is BLOCK
waived row requires owner, expiry, confidence impact, and rollback

caps: 0.55 if witness is generated before final version/package state
0.65 if residual risk schema is incomplete
0.6 if publishable output includes local-private evidence

assertions: does not duplicate receipt ledgers
does not include raw host invocation payloads in publishable summary
blocks on stale final evidence
scenarios.comparatorTolerance: hash values may differ; privacy and gate status exact

input.request: generate the local release witness for this final release gate

preconditions: release intent approval exists
final validators are complete or explicitly waived
version and package state are final
